item.title: The Uplift: The American Dream
item.description: We celebrate the United States ahead of its 250th anniversary with stories about American heroes and pastimes. The founder of e.l.f. Cosmetics shares how he made a massive life change to become a Catholic priest.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha strengthens, threatening Gulf Coast. See its path.
item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha is the second named storm of the Atlantic hurricane season.

item.title: Appeals court denies Biden bid to block release of tapes with biographer, for now
item.description: An appeals court denied former President Joe Biden's attempt to keep the Justice Department from giving a conservative think tank redacted transcripts and audio recordings of conversations with his biographer.

item.title: Supreme Court will review Alaska's bid to seize plane over 6-pack of beer
item.description: The pilot, Kenneth Jouppi, argues that taking his 1969 Cessna would violate the Eighth Amendment's "Excessive Fines Clause."

item.title: The Rising Cost of Being Single | Money Moves with Jill Schlesinger
item.description: Dating has become another casualty of inflation. A new study finds millennials spend an average of $252 per date and Gen Z spends $205. Meanwhile, half of singles say they're going on fewer dates or choosing cheaper activities. Plus, a 30-year-old single woman is daunted by the exorbitant cost of freezing her eggs, and TikTok investor Raoul Pal dismisses the S&P 500's 11% average annual return in favor of investing in bitcoin.

item.title: U.S. carries out 10th night of strikes on Iran after 3 U.S. troops killed
item.description: At least 3 U.S. service members were killed over the weekend in Iraq and Jordan, where back-to-back Iranian attacks on a U.S. base seem to have evaded defenses.

item.title: Key Arizona primaries to watch today
item.description: Arizona has traditionally been a red state, and six of its nine House representatives are Republicans.

item.title: Tourists stabbed near famed Acropolis in Athens, Greece
item.description: A man stabbed two tourists near the ancient Acropolis in Athens, Greece's top tourist attraction, police said.

item.title: Army veteran sets off fireworks, starts fire outside NYC federal building, FBI says
item.description: A man was arrested after law enforcement officials said he ignited fireworks, poured flammable liquid and started a fire at 26 Federal Plaza in Lower Manhattan.

item.title: FBI agents told to stand down on ICE assault probes; DOJ denies policy shift
item.description: Homeland Security Investigations is an arm of ICE, meaning the immigration enforcement agency would effectively be investigating incidents involving its own agents.

item.title: Pentagon ID's 2 soldiers killed in Iran strike in Jordan; 1 still missing
item.description: U.S. forces launched a new round of airstrikes against Iran at the direction of President Trump following the deaths of two U.S. soldiers in an Iranian strike in Jordan.

item.title: Video appears to show United employee threatening to call ICE on customer
item.description: A United Airlines employee appears to have been caught on video threatening to call U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement on a passenger last week at San Francisco International Airport.

item.title: Tate brothers detained as they face new charges, possible U.K. extradition
item.description: Influencer brothers Andrew and Tristan Tate will fight extradition to the U.K., where they face rape and sex trafficking charges.

item.title: Vice President Vance and second lady Usha welcome 4th child
item.description: Vice President JD Vance and second lady Usha Vance announced the birth of their fourth child on Sunday. CBS News White House reporter Olivia Rinaldi has the latest.

item.title: 7/20: CBS Evening News
item.description: Suspect arrested in New York City federal building explosion; FDA says it's still investigating Taylor Farms for cyclospora after false positive test.

item.title: Lindsey Graham's sister, Darline, announces bid for full Senate term in South Carolina
item.description: Darline Graham, the sister of late Sen. Lindsey Graham, says she will run for a full Senate term in South Carolina. CBS News political director Fin Gómez has more.

item.title: Qatari-gifted Air Force One to be sent off for defensive upgrades, Trump says
item.description: President Trump acknowledged that the new Qatari-gifted Air Force One jet needs security upgrades, saying the process should take about a month to complete. CBS News senior White House correspondent Weijia Jiang reports.

item.title: What to know about Taylor Farms amid the cyclospora outbreak
item.description: The nation's largest recent cyclospora outbreak has put one of America's biggest produce suppliers under renewed scrutiny.

item.title: 7/20: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: More U.S. strikes against Iran; two soldiers killed in Iranian strikes identified.

item.title: How 401(k) fees can cost tens of thousands in retirement savings
item.description: About four in 10 workers aren't even aware they pay fees on their 401(k)s, research has found. Here's what to know.

item.title: Darline Graham, Lindsey Graham's sister, says she'll run for full Senate term
item.description: Sen. Darline Graham, who is serving out the remainder of the late Sen. Lindsey Graham's term in the Senate, said she will seek a full term for the South Carolina seat her brother held for more than two decades.

item.title: Body found at Boston home owned by husband of Rep. Ayanna Pressley
item.description: Boston police are investigating the discovery Saturday of a dead body that was found at a property that is owned by the husband of Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley.

item.title: Spain wins 2026 FIFA World Cup with grueling 1-0 victory over Argentina
item.description: Spain dominated the match, outshooting Argentina 20-3, but couldn't manage a goal in regulation — finally scoring in the second period of extra time.

item.title: Severely ill prisoners granted early release are left stuck behind bars
item.description: Prisoners with severe medical conditions can be granted compassionate release, but without a long-term care facility willing to accept them, many continue to wait in prison as their conditions worsen.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 FIFA Men's World Cup today
item.description: Spain will face Argentina in the 2026 FIFA Men's World Cup final match on July 19. Here's how and when to watch the soccer game.

item.title: Trump encourages Darline Graham to run for Lindsey Graham's seat
item.description: Darline Graham indicated in a White House meeting Thursday that she's weighing a bid, CBS News confirmed. A day later, President Trump wrote on Truth Social: "RUN, DARLINE, RUN! "

item.title: Tim Scott doesn't rule out Darline Graham running for her brother Lindsey's Senate seat
item.description: With this year's race to succeed Lindsey Graham in the Senate still wide-open, GOP Sen. Tim Scott suggested the late senator's interim replacement — his sister, Darline Graham — could be one candidate.

item.title: Darline Graham, Lindsey Graham's sister, sworn in as senator
item.description: Darline Graham, the sister of the late Sen. Lindsey Graham, was sworn in to serve out the remainder of his term in the Senate, following his sudden death over the weekend.

item.title: The Uplift: Girl Scout glory
item.description: A 6-year-old Girl Scout overcomes the odds to set a record for more boxes of cookies sold. Plus, more heartwarming news.

item.title: The Uplift: Kermit the Frog moves cross country
item.description: Did you know Kermit the Frog recently made the move from Hollywood to Atlanta? Find out how the famous amphibian made the leap. Plus more heartwarming news.
